hero.headline: Bid, buy, win — online.
hero.subline: List items, place your bids or buy instantly at a fixed price.

auctions.title: Current listings
auctions.empty: There are no active listings right now. Check back soon!

step1.title: Browse
step1.text: Explore live auctions and find what interests you.

step2.title: Bid
step2.text: Place your bid and keep an eye on the remaining time.

step3.title: Win & pay
step3.text: As the highest bidder you win when it ends and pay securely.

features.title: What you can rely on
features.intro: From payment to the closing time, everything runs securely and transparently.

item1.title: Secure payment processing
item1.text: Runs through Stripe — your payment details never touch us.

item2.title: Automatic notifications
item2.text: An email the moment you're outbid or win.

item3.title: Fair auction close
item3.text: Ends automatically at the set time, the same for everyone.

Legal.placeholder: This page is a placeholder for a portfolio project and does not yet contain legally binding content.
